---
toc: false
---

# Preface {.unnumbered}

This is the new repository for my coding and teaching materials. The chapters will be gradually added here.


::: {.callout-important icon="true" appearance="simple" title="Transparency statement regarding the use of AI tools"}

The text of this book was written with the help of AI tools (ChatGPT 5, GitHub Copilot). All AI-generated text was carefully reviewed and edited by the author. Any errors or inaccuracies are the author's own.

:::
